Headline: #74 Fullerton Temporary Reroute at Fullerton/Southport
ShortDescription: 74 Fullerton buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Fullerton/Southport.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#74 Fullerton buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Fullerton, Ashland, Diversey, Southport, then resume their normal route at Fullerton, due to street blockage near Fullerton/Southport.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Southbound Reroute near Cottage Grove/115th
ShortDescription: SB 115 Pullman/115th buses are temp rerouted via Cottage Grove, 111th, King Drive, 115th, and over regular route due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/115th

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #115 Pullman/115th buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 111th, King Drive, 115th, and over regular route due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/115th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
